empty.desc: Group is used to manage initiator groups. Categorizing initiators (by host, department, or apps) can achieve sophisticated storage access control and configure access rules for specific LUNs

group.deleteConfirmText: Deleting the Group will interrupt its related LUN services. Please make sure the connected initiators are not reading or writing LUNs to avoid data corruption

lun.createConfirm:
LUN capacity cannot be reduced after creation
Thin LUN may cause file system damage when volume capacity is insufficient. Storage pool physical capacity must be monitored regularly and expanded in time. Do you want to continue?

form.name: Name
form.sizeOver: Capacity cannot exceed available volume capacity

confirmChangeLun.content: Saving settings will disconnect the LUN. Please ensure the initiator is not reading or writing the LUN to avoid data corruption. Do you want to save?

target.emptyContext: Target allows initiators to access storage resources via the network and supports CHAP authentication for secure access
